response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node depth, and current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his GenAI exposure spans roughly one year; the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG experience, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only limited cloud platform work (AWS CDK in one role). For a staff-level forward-deployed GenAI position with hard AI requirements, the core qualification gap is too large despite his general engineering caliber.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at current role, directly matching a key technology in the JD
Deep, broad engineering background (15+ years) across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record via workshops, courses, and conference talks, relevant to customer-facing enablement
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; GenAI work only began in 2025
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, all core to the role
Limited demonstrated experience designing AI systems on major cloud platforms or leading enterprise customer discovery engagements

key_factors.factor: RAG, vector DB, and Python gaps
MCP/agentic tooling and strong general engineering
